title: Russian Tanker Set to Arrive in Cuba Despite U.S. Blockade
summary: A tanker loaded with Russian fuel is set to arrive in Cuba as the United States considers lifting the blockade of the island to let it pass, Bloomberg reported today, citing unnamed sources in the know from Washington. title: Why Africa Must Build Energy Capacity Fast
summary: Africa needs to strengthen its energy sector in a hurry. The continent is the most underdeveloped on the planet, and today approximately 600 million Africans lack access to electricity. These numbers are in danger of skyrocketing if African leadership does not massively expand its energy production…

title: New fees, fewer flights: Higher fuel prices pinch consumer budgets beyond the gas pump
summary: As corporate policies change, Americans will feel higher oil prices in their wallets beyond the gas pump.
